_info":{"description":"天地玄黄，宇宙万物，，吾广修亿劫，证吾神话，三界内外，唯吾独","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8C9DvZSY5ItRP+YbXlEWbOTnpv5mB1+NzAJg3YtklWk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/945502fee8a74f5ebc4e1a26ae368841~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701171&x-signature=HDBI%2Bb%2B5F2QNPtwvs7PCZaHnqDs%3D","user_id":"3477115994899017","user_name":"神话.昊天上帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3477115994899017","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180667030176009277","book_info":{"abstract":"开局穿越成洪荒第一缕阳气东王公，觉醒神级选择系统。
熟知巫妖量劫剧情的他，选择开局闭关万万年，融合阴阳魔神本源，觉醒大罗三花十二品，塑造混沌魔神身躯。
开局，让西王母倾心！
这一世，我东王公不做天地之主，稳健积蓄势力，收祖龙做小弟、元凤为道侣，麒麟一族做守护神兽，兽王穷奇为坐骑。
冥河老祖、地祖镇元子、天皇伏羲、十二祖巫，皆为东王公的手下，拥有混元大罗金仙修为，战力无双。
洪荒争霸，关我稳健仙帝东王公什么事？
直到有一天，妖族和魔门统领洪荒，混沌魔神邪念破开天门，天地混沌毁灭，洪荒万族面临生死危机！
鸿钧道祖请东王公出山斩邪魔、平动乱，定乾坤。
东王公执掌鸿蒙世界，顿时间魔祖罗睺、混沌魔神、诸天邪祟，陷入黑暗和死亡之中！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f22fcf845e315191b8752400e151bdb0","author":"冥河血尊","author_id":"","book_id":"7180667030176009277","book_name":"神级选择：开局与西王母双修！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7180667140658168381","read_count":"13289","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1652522"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"811","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0233ffd6d918e381ee41254e0343276c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308843&x-signature=nIze8hkJf7swmsU5xQgW8fmbEW0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"892425266528439","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite m_cnt":"1.343365e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042723B598D114CA7B257E80CE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":35332},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1673871872,"author_reply_time":1673497203,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7215677376347439930","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者没有自己的思考，什么东西都是按部就班，在莫名其妙的给主角上一个名头！实际上没有主角关系不大，感觉主角可以没有。
对待，敌人，仇家！为了不改变剧情，导致作者不会写了，所以主角强行忍辱负重！没有洪荒最强者的霸气！
不合理的地方：
1—还有24混沌青莲不是主角在不周山就收了，后面各种12白莲，哪来的？
2—还有圣人，天之极数为9，你整的圣人太多了！战力稀碎，圣人之战随便就能打碎混荒大陆，你整的太多了，导致圣人战力降低了！
3-还有杨眉不在洪荒之内，为啥洪荒诞生了杨眉的本体？
4-洪荒有天道意志，各种先天魔神是怎么进入洪荒的？不合理啊？
5-还有已经死了的那么多人？盘古，先天三族，居然都活着？盘古神体化天地，山川，本体居然还活着？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680031537,"group_id":"7180667030176009277","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"307511939050973"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180667030176009277","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.032993e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10329,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7215653814002058044","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其他的还行，就是为了当个正派，特别刻意，我比较喜欢看，随心所欲，想杀就杀的，或者反派角色！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680025923,"group_id":"7180667030176009277","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这些苟作者都写得什么玩意儿，我自己写了一本，保证没有毒点！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2bslwNbJOUq3EysJ31uPes=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aab5a57e306d4d579cfed0f6df97aaf7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705720&x-signature=vsZf7nlqwWv4nEkjonIOK7sNA3I%3D","user_id":"307511939050973","user_name":"神农氏家族1号"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"307511939050973","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_co
